prompt: create a counter using 7 segment display. every time user hit button, the number increse, after 9 goes back to 0

reasons: only 1 weak signal (complex patterns in prompt) — using Haiku

trace.text: I'll create a 7-segment display counter for you. Let me build this circuit with a button to increment the counter from 0–9, then wrap back to 0.

errors: Sketch has errors: Unexpected identifier 'digits'. const declared variable 'byte' must have an initializer.

trace.text: Let me fix the array syntax:

notes: Typed arrays are transpiled to JavaScript arrays.
2D arrays require explicit brace initializers for each row.
unsupportedExamples: template<typename T> T id(T x) { return x; }

trace.text: Good—2D arrays are supported. Let me refactor to use simpler syntax:

trace.text: Perfect! Now let me get the detailed wiring and power analysis:

recommendations.message: Add a `power_supply` component to represent an external rail for motors/servos/relays/LED arrays.

issues: Bus short on row 5 left strip: pins -1, 8 are on the same bus
Button1 (button) input has no opposite-side reference. Wire the other side to GND (for INPUT_PULLUP) or 5V/3V3 (for INPUT).
